comments.text: For the last statement, I'm a little confusing about what "this" means here and which of bounds in [683] is equivalent to "this". My naive guess is that $(\log k)^{O(1)}$ bound here ("this") corresponds to $e^{c\sqrt{k}}$ bound in [683], but it is not super clear to me why this is the case. The question is mainly for adding precise conjecture in the this PR for the formal conjectures project.
